description: Phase 4: Depth & Polish - Tier 4-5 crafting, tech tree, boss monsters, NPCs, lore, experimentation crafting

userStories.title: Tier 4 materials + AdvancedForge
userStories.notes: AdvancedForge, AlchemyLab, RareHerb, Gemstone, AncientCore items. CraftingTier::AdvancedForge.

userStories.title: Potion consumption with buffs
userStories.notes: ActiveBuff component, Speed/Strength buffs, buff_tick system, HUD display.

userStories.title: Tier 4-5 material world drops
userStories.notes: AncientRuin WorldObject in Mountain/Volcanic. CrystalNode+Gemstone, AlpineFlower+RareHerb.

userStories.title: Tech tree + blueprint discovery
userStories.notes: TechTree resource, research points from crafting/kills, Blueprint item unlocks recipes.

userStories.title: Boss monsters in dungeons
userStories.notes: Boss component, StoneGolem 200hp. Loot table drops on death. boss_death_loot system.

userStories.title: Biome boss variants
userStories.notes: 7 biome bosses with unique drops. boss_for_biome(). Dungeon uses biome-specific boss.

userStories.title: Wandering trader NPC
userStories.notes: Trader component, spawn every 3-5 days, 3-5 offers, despawn after 2 days.

userStories.title: Trader interaction UI
userStories.notes: TradeMenu resource, E key toggle, arrow select, Enter buy. Offer pool randomized.

userStories.title: Hermit NPCs with dialogue
userStories.notes: Hermit component, dialogue cycling, Invulnerable marker.

userStories.title: Journal page lore
userStories.notes: LoreRegistry with 20 entries. JournalPage consumption. Lore count in HUD.

userStories.title: Experimentation crafting
userStories.notes: ExperimentSlots, X key UI, 5 hidden recipes, success/failure feedback.

userStories.title: Weapon damage scaling
userStories.notes: weapon_damage() on ItemType. Combat uses equipped weapon. Strength buff 2x. Fist=5 base.

userStories.title: Armor damage reduction
userStories.notes: ArmorSlots resource, R to equip, total_armor reduces incoming damage. HUD shows armor+ATK.

userStories.title: Save/load Phase 4 systems
userStories.notes: New ItemTypes serialize. TechTree/Lore/Armor save deferred to Phase 5 polish.

userStories.title: Recipe count + crafting polish
userStories.notes: 50+ recipes across 6 tiers. Crafting menu handles scroll correctly.
